title: rhododendron × sinosimulans
intro: Rhododendron × sinosimulans, also known as Sino-rhododendron or Sino-simulans, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Rhododendron sinense and Rhododendron simsii. It is a flowering evergreen shrub native to China, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, thanks to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Rhododendron × sinosimulans is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to benefit from its medicinal properties.
